sourcePrompt: A MiG-17 "Fresco", the NVA's nimble Soviet jet fighter, about eleven meters long, parked nose-high on tricycle gear. The whole nose is a round open air intake; a bubble canopy sits close behind it over a slim barrel fuselage that tapers straight to a single exhaust. Mid-set wings sweep back hard wearing low fences across their. Low-poly, +X forward, ground at Y=0; named pivots for moving parts.
